data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Greentown Labs/
data.description: Greentown Labs, in partnership with Amazon and the Global CO2 Initiative, announced the launch of the Startup Cohort for Greentown Go Build 2026 on March 19, 2026. The press release distributed by Greentown Labs through PR Newswire mentioned the removal of the accompanying image. The program aims to support innovative startups focused on sustainability and reducing CO2 emissions. The total number of startups participating in the cohort and the specific details of their projects were not disclosed in the news release.

data.title: Roof Inspection After Storm Damage Explained in HelloNation Article Featuring Roofing Expert R. Sean Fahey
data.description: In Salisbury, Md., on March 19, 2026, an article was released by HelloNation through PRNewswire, advising homeowners on the ideal timing for scheduling a roof inspection post-storm damage to avoid expensive repairs. The article offers valuable insights and tips on how to detect and manage issues caused by storms, aiming to help individuals make informed decisions regarding their roofs and prevent unnecessary expenses.

data.title: New Drug Cost Study: Canadian Online Pharmacies Offer Up to 89% Savings Versus GoodRx and Amazon for U.S. Consumers, Says Campaign for Personal Prescription Importation
data.description: A recent study conducted on drug costs indicates that Canadian online pharmacies are providing American consumers with savings of up to 89% compared to prices on GoodRx and Amazon. The study was carried out by the non-profit organization CPPI.

data.title: Jabil Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q2 Results
data.description: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) exceeded expectations in Q2 of fiscal year 2026, reporting adjusted earnings per share of $2.69, surpassing the estimated $2.51. The company's quarterly net revenue stood at $8.28 billion, a decrease of 23.1% year-over-year but still higher than the expected $7.74 billion. For Q3 of 2026, Jabil anticipates net revenue to range between $8.1 billion and $8.9 billion, higher than the analyst's projection of $8.037 billion. The adjusted earnings per share for this quarter are expected to be between $2.83 and $3.23, against the estimated $2.89. Jabil's focus on incorporating advanced technologies like AI and automation in its operations has led to a positive outlook for fiscal year 2026, with projected net revenue of $34 billion.

data.title: Global Tech Hiring Remains Strong as U.S. Outlook Shows Measured Q2 Improvement
data.description: The most recent Experis Tech Talent Outlook report reveals a continued high demand for specialized technical skills, particularly in the United States. After a recent decrease, U.S. hiring intentions in the tech sector are now steadying. This signals a positive trend in the job market as companies show a sustained interest in recruiting tech professionals. This news, shared on March 19, 2026, indicates a potential stabilization in hiring plans, providing hope for the tech industry and job seekers.

data.title: Internet2 Announces Plenary Speakers for 2026 Community Exchange
data.description: In Chicago on March 19, 2026, Internet2 revealed details about their upcoming event, the 2026 Internet2 Community Exchange (CommEX26), scheduled for April 13-16. This program commemorates the network's 30th anniversary and will focus on themes like networked creativity, collaboration as a strategic multiplier, and purpose-driven AI. The event will feature a diverse lineup of plenary speakers discussing cutting-edge topics. Participants can expect to engage with these concepts and explore their significance in the digital landscape. This event is poised to attract a significant number of attendees, showcasing the growing interest and importance of these subjects.

data.title: LinkSquares Featured in The Boston Globe's list of New England's Fastest Growing Companies 2026
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Boston, it was reported that LinkSquares has been named one of New England's Fastest-Growing Companies in The Boston Globe's 2nd annual list. This recognition was achieved through collaboration with Statista, a prominent global statistics portal. LinkSquares is proud to be a part of this prestigious ranking, showcasing its remarkable growth in the region.

data.title: Andersen Consulting Expands Technology Platform in France
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has broadened its digital transformation services by entering into a Collaboration Agreement with Teolia Consulting. This move is aimed at enhancing their capabilities in the digital space, potentially leading to increased market reach and greater service offerings. The partnership underscores Andersen Consulting's commitment to staying at the forefront of the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Stonebranch Releases 2026 Global State of IT Automation Report, Revealing Orchestration as the Missing Link for AI Adoption and Trust
data.description: A recent study conducted in Alpharetta, Georgia, highlights the increasing adoption of hybrid IT orchestration, self-service automation, and Workload Automation (WLA) in enterprises. The research reveals a significant uptick in investments in these areas as AI-driven workflow delivery expands throughout organizations. This trend underscores the growing focus on incorporating advanced technologies to streamline operations and enhance efficiency at scale.

data.title: Phenom Earns 2026 Lighthouse Tech Award for Best Advance in Practical AI
data.description: Phenom, a company based in Philadelphia, was recently honored with the 2026 Lighthouse Tech Award in the field of HR Tech for their exceptional advancements in Practical AI. This recognition highlights their outstanding contribution to the industry. The award serves as a testament to their innovative approach, with the potential to significantly impact the future of AI technology. Phenom's achievement is especially noteworthy in the competitive tech landscape, showcasing their dedication to excellence. This accolade underscores their commitment to pushing boundaries and driving progress.

data.title: Apex Group’s Tokeny collaborates with Polygon to launch T-REX Ledger for regulatory-compliant tokenized RWAs.
data.description: Tokeny and Polygon Labs, part of the Apex Group, have collaborated to introduce the T-REX Ledger, a blockchain built on Polygon with the objective of streamlining compliance processes for ERC-3643 security tokens. This partnership signifies a significant step towards centralizing compliance within the blockchain space and is expected to enhance security and efficiency for tokenized assets. Through the T-REX Ledger, stakeholders can expect improved oversight and transparency for transactions involving security tokens. The introduction of this Polygon-based blockchain is a strategic move that aligns with the growing trend of utilizing blockchain technology for regulatory compliance. The collaboration between Tokeny and Polygon Labs reflects a joint effort to address the evolving needs of the market, with the T-REX Ledger poised to revolutionize the management of security tokens on a broader scale.
